revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:German coord convert
| 1 = {{{NS}}}
| 2 = {{{EW}}}
| 3 = {{safesubst:#if:{{{region|}}}|region:{{{region}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{dim|}}}|_dim:{{{dim}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{type|}}}|_type:{{{type}}}{{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{type}}}|city|{{safesubst:#if:{{{pop|}}}|({{{pop}}})}}}}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| display = {{safesubst:#if:{{{display|}}}|{{{display}}}|{{safesubst:#if:{{{text|}}}|{{safesubst:#if:{{{article|}}}|inline,title}}|title}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.text:

| 1 = {{{NS}}}
| 2 = {{{EW}}}
| 3 = {{safesubst:#if:{{{region|}}}|region:{{{region}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{dim|}}}|_dim:{{{dim}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{type|}}}|_type:{{{type}}}{{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{type}}}|city|{{safesubst:#if:{{{pop|}}}|({{{pop}}})}}}}}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:German coord convert
| 1 = {{{NS}}}
| 2 = {{{EW}}}
| 3 = {{safesubst:#if:{{{region|}}}|region:{{{region}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{dim|}}}|_dim:{{{dim}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{type|}}}|_type:{{{type}}}{{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{type}}}|city|{{safesubst:#if:{{{pop|}}}|({{{pop}}})}}}}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| display = {{safesubst:#if:{{{display|}}}|{{{display}}}|{{safesubst:#if:{{{text|}}}|{{safesubst:#if:{{{article|}}}|inline,title}}|title}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Coordinate here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Coordinate for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{safesubst:German coord convert
| 1 = {{{NS}}}
| 2 = {{{EW}}}
| 3 = {{safesubst:#if:{{{region|}}}|region:{{{region}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{dim|}}}|_dim:{{{dim}}}}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{type|}}}|_type:{{{type}}}{{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{type}}}|city|{{safesubst:#if:{{{pop|}}}|({{{pop}}})}}}}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| display = {{safesubst:#if:{{{display|}}}|{{{display}}}|{{safesubst:#if:{{{text|}}}|{{safesubst:#if:{{{article|}}}|inline,title}}|title}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
